message.content:
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory
participant "AudioFileHeader" as AudioFileHeader
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory" as AudioFileHeader_accessory
participant "AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter" as AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter

AudioFileHeader -> AudioFileHeader_accessory: 1 audio id
AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter: 2 audio id
AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter: 3 edit sample and delete sample dialogs as render functions
opt [if route is "Quick Save"]
    AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter: 4 assign sample dialog as render functions
end
AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory: 5 list of render functions
AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory: 6 render drop-down menu and dialog render functions in render()
@enduml
